title: RBI issues Directions on Asset Classification, Provisioning, and Income Recognition for Commercial Banks
description: The Reserve Bank of India had, on October 07, 2025, issued the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks-Asset Classification, Provisioning and Income Recognition) Directions, 2025 for stakeholder feedback. 2. Feedback received on the draft Directions has been examined and consequent modifications, as deemed appropriate, have been suitably incorporated in the final Directions. A statement on the feedback received on the draft Directions is provided in the Annex. 3. Accordingly, the Reserve Bank ha
